brief_notes: All numerical claims in the generated paper are verified correct against the source extraction. Network parameters (N=5000, NE=4000, NI=1000, p=0.2, C=10^3), neuron parameters (Cm, gm, tau_rp for both populations), synaptic time constants (AMPA, NMDA, GABA latency/rise/decay), NMDAR voltage dependence parameters (beta, gamma, Mg2+), firing rates for all four conditions (steady baseline, critical baseline, steady +5%, critical +5%), oscillation frequencies (50 Hz model, 55 Hz experimental, 58 Hz predicted), correlation lag peaks (18ms experimental, 20ms model), neuron pair counts (978/368 cue-aligned, 1246/434 response-aligned), DPX task percentages (69%/31%), PCP dose (0.25-0.30 mg/kg IM), task timing (1000ms cue, 1000ms delay, 500ms probe), electrode spacing (400 um, 400-1400 um range), and analysis parameters (2ms resolution, 100ms window, K~200 trials, 5 Hz geometric mean threshold) all match exactly. The paper is well-organized with clear tables for neuron parameters, synaptic constants, and firing rate comparisons. Writing quality is strong with good academic prose. Main deductions: methods could include more mathematical detail from the mean field analysis, some citations use placeholder keys rather than verified references, and the paper lacks figure descriptions (understandable for text-only output). The discussion section is thorough but could be slightly more detailed on limitations.
